note: a multi-part logo (pump + person): boxy pump drawn axis-aligned with its window as a retraced spur; the hose is ONE exaggerated 360° coil; head and headphone band merged into a single dome
an organic animal: one bold continuous silhouette; the spiky mane — the identity feature — is exaggerated and carries the whole drawing; legs are simple rectangles
a grid-native animal: boxy shell, head, tail and legs all axis-aligned so every edge lands on a street; instantly readable
